description: Unique ID assigned by the Survey. Not necessarily permanent.
Lease name.
ID code assigned by the Kansas Department of Revenue.
If the Kansas Geological Survey has made a link between one or more wells and the production data shown, then the API number(s) will be listed here.
Oil and gas field name that this production is assigned to.
Producing formation. May be assigned from the field name or information that is associated with the well.
Operator of the lease. Updated by the Dept. of Revenue.
County where lease is located.
Public Land Survey System township number, 1-35 in Kansas.
Township direction. S (south) or N (north), Always south in Kansas
Public Land Survey System range number, 1-43 in west and 1-25 in east.
Range direction. E (east) or W (west).
The PLSS section the site is located in: 1-36
The legal quarter description qualifiers list as NE, NW, SE, and SW, etc. May be pulled from well data or DOR information; of limited quality
NAD 1927, generated from the legal location.
The latitude and longitude for production data is generally not as well defined as the location created for well data.
Month and Year for the production information. Yearly data is indicated by Month=0; starting cumulative value indicated by Month=-1.
O = oil, G = gas (including coalbed methane).
Number of wells contributing to the lease. Of limited quality.
Production of oil is in barrels; production of gas is in MCF (1000 cubic feet).
